name: Hunger Games - Cirrus Quell
overview: Set 51 years before Katniss Everdeen stepped foot in the arena was Cirrus Quell, the 17-year-old District 7 volunteer for the 23rd Annual Hunger Games. The real reason why the Quarter Quell was created.
